DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MEGAN TAPPIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES SPECIFYING WHETHER DOCUMENTS EXIST AS TO EACH REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION AND SHALL PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 23 AND NON-PRIVILEGED DOCUMENTS IN RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION NO. 24. AS TO DOCUMENTS DEFENDANT IS ASSERTING ARE PRIVILEGED, DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE A CODE-COMPLIANT PRIVILEGE LOG. THE PARTIES SHALL FURTHER MEET AND CONFER REGARDING PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN A PRIVILEGE LOG. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEPHANIE KRMPOTIC; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MEGAN TAPPIN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is Motion granted. Defendant is ordered to provide supplemental responses specifying whether documents exist as to each Request for Production and shall produce responsive documents. Defendant is ordered to produce documents in response to Request for Production No. 23 and non-privileged documents in response to Request for Production No. 24. As to documents defendant is asserting are privileged, defendant shall provide a code-compliant privilege log. The parties shall further meet and confer regarding production of documents identified in a privilege log. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories - Employment Law And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MEGAN TAPPIN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories - Employment Law And Request For Sanctions is Granted. Defendant is ordered to provide supplemental responses to Form Interrogatories - Employment Law within 10-days. Written order is signed and filed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Continued To Nov-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES IN THIS MATTER.

RULING: PLAINTIFF MEGAN TAPPIN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Request For Sanctions is Continued to November 7, 2016 to give Defendant Sotano, et al., the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.7B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 25, 2016 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f).

Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (JPT/302)
